description:
As an API consumer
  I want to create a user
  So that I can register new users in an environment

elements.name: Create a user with valid data returns 201

steps.name: I create a user with name "juan perez", email "juan.perez@efake.com" and age 30
the response status should be 201
the response body contains a user with email "juan.perez@efake.com"
the response body contains the user name "juan perez"
the response body contains the user age 30

elements.name: Create a user response contains all required fields

steps.name: I create a user with name "juan perez", email "juan.perez@efake.com" and age 25
the response status should be 201
the response body contains fields "name", "email" and "age"

elements.name: Create a user with duplicate email returns 409

steps.name: a user exists with name "Original User", email "duplicate@efake.com" and age 20
I create a user with name "Another User", email "duplicate@efake.com" and age 22
the response status should be 409

result.error_message:
AssertionError [ERR_ASSERTION]: Expected status 409 but got 500. Body: {"error":"Internal server error"}

500 !== 409

    + expected - actual

    -500
    +409

    at World.<anonymous> (/home/kiwi/Documents/user-management-api-challenge/e2e/steps/users.js:109:10)

steps.name: the response body contains an error message

elements.name: Create a user with missing name returns 400

steps.name: I create a user with missing "name" field using email "missingname@efake.com" and age 28
the response status should be 400
the response body contains an error message

elements.name: Create a user with missing email returns 400

steps.name: I create a user with missing "email" field using name "No Email User" and age 28
the response status should be 400
the response body contains an error message

elements.name: Create a user with missing age returns 400

steps.name: I create a user with missing "age" field using name "No Age User" and email "noage@efake.com"
the response status should be 400
the response body contains an error message

elements.name: Create a user with age below minimum (0) returns 400

steps.name: I create a user with name "Too Young", email "tooyoung@efake.com" and age 0
the response status should be 400
the response body contains an error message

elements.name: Create a user with age above maximum (151) returns 400

steps.name: I create a user with name "Too Old", email "tooold@efake.com" and age 151
the response status should be 400
the response body contains an error message

elements.name: Create a user with minimum valid age (1) returns 201

steps.name: I create a user with name "Young Valid", email "youngvalid@efake.com" and age 1
the response status should be 201

elements.name: Create a user with maximum valid age (150) returns 201

steps.name: I create a user with name "Old Valid", email "oldvalid@efake.com" and age 150
the response status should be 201

name: Create User

description:
As an API consumer
  I want to delete a user
  So that I can remove users from an environment

elements.name: Delete an existing user with valid auth returns 204

steps.name: a user exists with name "To Be Deleted", email "todelete@example.com" and age 30
I delete user with email "todelete@example.com" using valid authentication
the response status should be 204

elements.name: Deleted user no longer exists

steps.name: a user exists with name "Delete Verify", email "deleteverify@example.com" and age 30
I delete user with email "deleteverify@example.com" using valid authentication
the response status should be 204
I get user with email "deleteverify@example.com"
the response status should be 404

result.error_message:

500 !== 404

    + expected - actual

    -500
    +404

name: Delete User

description:
As an API consumer
  I want to retrieve a user by email
  So that I can view user details

elements.name: Get an existing user returns 200

steps.name: a user exists with name "Get Test User", email "gettest@example.com" and age 35
I get user with email "gettest@example.com"
the response status should be 200

elements.name: Get an existing user returns full user data

steps.name: a user exists with name "Full Data User", email "fulldata@example.com" and age 40
I get user with email "fulldata@example.com"
the response status should be 200
the response body contains a user with email "fulldata@example.com"
the response body contains the user name "Full Data User"
the response body contains the user age 40

elements.name: Get a non-existent user returns 404

steps.name: I get user with email "nonexistent@example.com"
the response status should be 404

result.error_message:

500 !== 404

    + expected - actual

    -500
    +404

    at World.<anonymous> (/home/kiwi/Documents/user-management-api-challenge/e2e/steps/users.js:109:10)

name: Get User by Email

description:
As an API consumer
  I want to list all users in an environment
  So that I can see who is registered

elements.name: List users returns HTTP 200

steps.name: I list all users
the response status should be 200

elements.name: List users response body is a JSON array

steps.name: I list all users
the response status should be 200
the response body is a JSON array

elements.name: Newly created user appears in the list

steps.name: a user exists with name "List Test User", email "listtest@example.com" and age 25
I list all users
the response status should be 200
the response body is a JSON array
the list includes a user with email "listtest@example.com"

name: List Users

description:
As an API consumer
  I want to update an existing user
  So that I can keep user information current

elements.name: Update an existing user returns 200

steps.name: a user exists with name "Original Name", email "updatetest@example.com" and age 25
I update user with email "updatetest@example.com" to name "Updated Name" and age 26
the response status should be 200
the response body contains the user name "Updated Name"
the response body contains the user age 26

elements.name: Update preserves the email field

steps.name: a user exists with name "Email Keeper", email "emailkeeper@example.com" and age 30
I update user with email "emailkeeper@example.com" to name "Email Keeper Updated" and age 31
the response status should be 200
the response body contains a user with email "emailkeeper@example.com"

elements.name: Update a user to a new email returns 200

steps.name: a user exists with name "Email Changer", email "oldemail@example.com" and age 22
I update user with email "oldemail@example.com" to new email "newemail@example.com", name "Email Changer" and age 22
the response status should be 200
the response body contains a user with email "newemail@example.com"

elements.name: Update a non-existent user returns 404

steps.name: I update user with email "ghost@example.com" to name "Ghost" and age 99
the response status should be 404
the response body contains an error message

elements.name: Update a user with missing name returns 400

steps.name: a user exists with name "Valid User", email "validupdate@example.com" and age 28
I update user with email "validupdate@example.com" with missing "name" field
the response status should be 400
the response body contains an error message

elements.name: Update a user with missing age returns 400

steps.name: a user exists with name "Valid User 2", email "validupdate2@example.com" and age 28
I update user with email "validupdate2@example.com" with missing "age" field
the response status should be 400
the response body contains an error message

elements.name: Update a user with duplicate email returns 409

steps.name: a user exists with name "User A", email "usera@example.com" and age 20
a user exists with name "User B", email "userb@example.com" and age 21
I update user with email "usera@example.com" to new email "userb@example.com", name "User A" and age 20
the response status should be 409
the response body contains an error message

name: Update User
